---
id: generate-playlist-artwork
title: "Generate AI artwork for playlist"
description: "Uses AI to generate cover artwork for the playlist. Returns an HTML fragment with the new artwork."
sidebar_label: "Generate AI artwork for playlist"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api//spotter-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Generate AI artwork for playlist"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/playlists/{id}/ai/generate-artwork"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Uses AI to generate cover artwork for the playlist. Returns an HTML fragment with the new artwork.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
